subcodes.first_line: We have rent asunder the veils and revealed the verses, that perchance the people may attain certitude in the meeting with their Lord. Every party hath been prevented [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد خرقنا السبحات و نزلنا الایات لعل الناس بلقاء ربهم یوقنون قد منع کل حزب
subcodes.subjects: @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @nearness to God
